title: Overlay buy/sell signal arrows/labels directly on the candlestick chart

requirements.text: Overlay buy/sell signal markers directly on the candlestick chart canvas. For each candle where a BUY signal is detected, render a green upward-pointing arrow below the candle's low wick. For each candle where a SELL signal is detected, render a red downward-pointing arrow above the candle's high wick. Each arrow must include a small label showing the dominant pattern name (e.g., 'Hammer', 'Engulfing') and the confidence score (e.g., '78%'). Markers must be drawn as part of the existing CandlestickChart canvas rendering pipeline so they pan and zoom in sync with the candles.

quotes: ise esa banao ki ye chart ke uper signal dey

acceptanceCriteria: A green upward arrow appears below the low of any candle that produced a BUY signal.
A red downward arrow appears above the high of any candle that produced a SELL signal.
Each signal marker displays the dominant pattern name and confidence score as a small text label.
Signal markers pan and zoom in sync with the candlestick chart (they are part of the canvas draw cycle).
No signal marker is rendered for NEUTRAL or TBC signals that did not reach a clear BUY/SELL threshold.
Markers do not obscure price data and are visually distinct from EMA lines and support/resistance bands.

constraints: Signal markers must be drawn on the existing CandlestickChart canvas — do not create a separate overlay element.
Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new signal logic or changing the signal aggregation algorithm.
Showing signal markers on the volume sub-chart.
Adding click-to-inspect popup for signal markers in this iteration.
